subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Creator of Heaven, wherein He guideth His servants unto His straight Path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله فاطر السماء و فیه یهدی العباد الی صراطه المستقیم
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @exhortations and counsels, @call to action
